mission.title: clickhouse: Implement ULID function
mission.description: Implement ULID function. Requested by 21+ users.

steps.title: Check current clickhouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires a working clickhouse installation.

steps.title: Review clickhouse configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:
**Use case**

Implement ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier) this a new way to create unique identify, and many projects adopting this algorithm.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Implement ULID function
steps.description:
### Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

### Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):
Add `generateULID()` function. Closes https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/36536

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Implement ULID function" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:

prerequisites.description: A working clickhouse installation or development environment.
